articles.title: About | Acerca de
articles.contents:
👋 Hi, I’m Iván de Luna.
I studied Finance (Tec de Monterrey), M.Sc. International Finance (HWR Berlin), Ph.D. in Business Administration (UAdeC), and recently completed a Specialty degree in Statistical Methods (CIMAT).
👀 Interests: Finance, Statistics, Economics, ML/AI, Data Science, Regional Development and Governance, and Entrepreneurship.
🌱 Currently working as an IT-Finance Systems Manager, Risk Management lecturer and independent consultant in business intelligence and development.
📫 You can reach me at Twitter @idelunaa or Github @ivandeluna
Opinions on my own.
